[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110 2
1 1111100 5
2 0011101 4
3 0010001 2
4 0101110 4
5 1011011 5
6 0000010 1
7 0001101 3

23 32 1000000 1
34 43 0000010 1 match 6
45 54 0010010 2
56 65 0010000 1
67 76 0010001 2 match 3
70 07 0010101 3

47 74 0010101 3
